heading: Omitted

notes: CodificationSection, , , which provided that nothing in this subchapter would affect the status of the members of the tribe as citizens of the United States, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.act Aug. 27, 1954, ch. 1009, § 2568 Stat. 877
